categories.name: Nursing Licensure
categories.description: Master the clinical judgment and safety-first nursing knowledge needed to pass licensure exams and practice confidently from day one.

exams.name: National Council Licensure Examination for Practical Nurses (NCLEX-PN)
exams.hero_subheadline: Study every tested client-needs domain in 15-minute topics mapped directly to the official NCSBN blueprint.
exams.companion_problem: Most NCLEX prep feels scattered, so learners waste time on content that is not prioritized by the actual exam blueprint.
exams.companion_solution: We convert the official test plan into a complete, structured curriculum with concise notes designed for long-term retention and exam readiness.

exams.name: NCLEX-RN
exams.hero_headline: Pass NCLEX-RN with clinical judgment that sticks.
exams.hero_subheadline: Exam-aligned nursing study paths built from the official NCSBN test plan and designed for long-term retention.
exams.companion_problem: Most prep material is fragmented, too broad, or disconnected from the exact NCLEX-RN blueprint.
exams.companion_solution: Only Ever maps the official test plan into structured 15-minute topics and retention-first notes so you learn exactly what the exam expects.

categories.name: Teacher Certification
categories.description: Exam-aligned prep for future educators with clear, structured math coverage built directly from official certification blueprints.

exams.name: Praxis Elementary Education: Multiple Subjects
exams.hero_subheadline: Study every tested domain in focused 15-minute topics mapped directly to the ETS Study Companion.
exams.companion_problem: Most Praxis prep mixes signal with noise, so candidates spend time on content that is not tightly aligned to test objectives.
exams.companion_solution: We convert the official ETS syllabus into a full learning map with topic-sized notes and consistent concept coverage for retention.

exams.name: English Language Arts: Content Knowledge
exams.hero_headline: Pass Praxis 5038 with ELA content knowledge you can apply on test day
exams.hero_subheadline: Work through every domain in focused 15-minute topics aligned to the official ETS Study Companion.
exams.companion_problem: Most Praxis ELA prep scatters practice without a clear map of what the exam actually weights—reading, conventions, and communication skills blur together.
exams.companion_solution: We translate the official ETS syllabus into a complete topic map with retention-focused notes and consistent coverage of literature, informational text, and language use.

exams.name: Social Studies: Content Knowledge (5081)
exams.hero_headline: Pass Praxis 5081 with social studies mapped to the official objectives
exams.hero_subheadline: Study U.S. and world history, civics, geography, economics, and behavioral sciences in focused 15-minute topics aligned to the ETS Study Companion.
exams.companion_problem: Most Praxis social studies prep either stays shallow across six domains or piles facts without the cross-topic structure the exam expects.
exams.companion_solution: We translate the official ETS syllabus into a full learning map with topic-sized notes, explicit domain boundaries, and retention-focused structure.

exams.name: Mathematics (5165)
exams.hero_headline: Pass Praxis 5165 with secondary math mapped to the official objectives
exams.hero_subheadline: Study Number & Quantity through Statistics & Probability in focused 15-minute topics aligned to the ETS Study Companion.
exams.companion_problem: Most Praxis math prep either drills mechanics without the teaching frame or scatters topics so you cannot see how the exam weights algebra, geometry, and stats.
exams.companion_solution: We translate the official ETS syllabus into a full learning map with topic-sized notes, consistent coverage of instructional scenarios, and retention-focused structure.

exams.name: Biology: Content Knowledge
exams.hero_headline: Pass Praxis 5236 with biology content mapped to the official objectives
exams.hero_subheadline: Study cell biology, genetics, evolution, organismal biology, ecology, and the nature of science in focused 15-minute topics aligned to the ETS Study Companion.
exams.companion_problem: Most Praxis biology prep either stays shallow across vast domains like genetics and ecology or piles facts without the cross-topic structure and application the exam expects.
exams.companion_solution: We translate the official ETS syllabus into a full learning map with topic-sized notes, explicit domain boundaries, and retention-focused structure covering all five major biology content categories.

exams.name: Special Education: Core Knowledge and Applications
exams.hero_headline: Pass Praxis 5354 with special education knowledge mapped to the official objectives
exams.hero_subheadline: Study foundations, planning, instruction, assessment, and learner characteristics in focused 15-minute topics aligned to the ETS Study Companion.
exams.companion_problem: Most Praxis special education prep either stays shallow across pedagogical theories or piles facts without the practical application and structure the exam expects.
exams.companion_solution: We translate the official ETS syllabus into a full learning map with topic-sized notes, explicit domain boundaries, and retention-focused structure covering all five major special education content categories.

exams.name: Elementary Education: Content Knowledge for Teaching
exams.hero_headline: Pass Praxis 7811 with classroom-accurate exam coverage
exams.hero_subheadline: Master every tested subtest in focused 15-minute topics mapped directly to the official ETS Study Companion.
exams.companion_problem: Most Praxis prep is either too generic or fragmented, so candidates struggle to prioritize what is truly test-relevant.
exams.companion_solution: We convert the official ETS syllabus into a complete topic map with retention-focused notes and consistent concept coverage.

exams.name: Praxis Core Academic Skills for Educators: Mathematics
exams.hero_headline: Pass Praxis Core Math with exam-accurate coverage
exams.hero_subheadline: Master every tested objective in 15-minute topics mapped to the official ETS study companion.
exams.companion_problem: Most Praxis prep is either too shallow or too broad, making it hard to know what is actually test-relevant.
exams.companion_solution: We convert the official syllabus into a complete, topic-sized learning map with retention-focused notes and consistent concept coverage.
